text.name: input_BIDIR_TOGGLE_PULL
text.text: Bi-Dir: Toggle Pull-Fill (load tool from pallets)

text.name: input_BIDIR_TOGGLE_PUSH
text.text: Bi-Dir: Toggle Push-Fill (empty tool into pallets)

text.name: bidir_menu_overlay_tooltip
text.text: Show floating fill-level labels above pallets near a tool. Required for cycling pallet selection.

text.name: bidir_menu_push_rate_tooltip
text.text: Litres per second transferred from the tool into nearby pallets while push-fill is on. Higher rates fill faster but feel less realistic.

text.name: bidir_menu_multi_pallet_tooltip
text.text: When on, push-fill spreads transfer across every eligible pallet at once, and pull-fill drains other compatible pallets in parallel with the picked one. When off, transfers go one pallet at a time.
